ranges.notes: Cold winter weather, temperatures often below freezing; low tourists except for New Year; festive atmosphere early month but limited outdoor activities.
Very cold and damp, minimal daylight, most attractions indoors; low tourist activity; not ideal for beach or outdoor sightseeing.
Cold winter continues; some cultural events indoors; low crowds and prices; weather limits outdoor activities.
Still cold but the wine festival attracts some visitors; indoor events enliven the month; good for culture lovers.
Early spring, weather improving but still chilly and unpredictable; low crowds; good for budget travelers seeking off-season deals.
Spring starts to show; mild weather with occasional rain; moderate crowds around the holiday; cultural events and early outdoor activities begin.
Spring in full bloom, pleasant temperatures; ideal for sightseeing and nature walks; low to moderate crowds; beginning of tourist season.
Easter is a major holiday with local customs and religious events; mild weather; moderate crowds especially from domestic tourists.
Warm and sunny weather perfect for beach and city sightseeing; many cultural events begin; comfortable temperatures; increasing tourist numbers but not overcrowded.
Late spring, excellent weather for beaches and outdoor activities; vibrant nightlife starts; great value before peak summer season.
Early summer, hot and sunny; perfect beach weather; increasing tourists but not yet peak; many outdoor festivals and events.

ranges.event: Varna International Ballet Competition (biennial, check year)
ranges.notes: Late June brings some cultural events; very warm weather but some days can be hot; crowds start to peak; good for culture and beach lovers.
Peak summer season with hot weather, busy beaches, high tourist crowd; many open-air concerts and events; prices peak; best for those who enjoy lively atmosphere.
Still very warm and sunny; peak tourist crowds; beaches crowded; excellent nightlife and festivals continue; prices remain high.
Major city holiday with festivities and fireworks; very warm but some relief as summer wanes; high crowds and prices; great for cultural enthusiasts.
Early autumn with warm sea temperatures and mild weather; crowds start to thin; ideal for beach and sightseeing; excellent value and comfort.
Weather remains pleasant; fewer tourists; good for cultural activities and outdoor excursions; some businesses begin to reduce hours after peak season.
Cooler autumn weather; occasional rain; quieter tourist scene; good for cultural visits and exploring historic sites; sea too cold for swimming.
Chillier and wetter; many seasonal businesses close; low crowds; limited outdoor activities; better suited for those who prefer quiet and low costs.
Cold, damp, and often rainy; low tourist activity; most outdoor attractions closed; suitable only for business travelers or very budget-conscious visitors.
Cold and dark; some Christmas markets and festive events late month; low crowds; indoor cultural activities available; not ideal for outdoor sightseeing or beach.

ranges.event: Christmas and New Year's Eve Festivities
ranges.notes: Festive atmosphere with local celebrations; colder weather; moderate crowds especially around holidays; good for cultural immersion and holiday markets.
